iterations.theme: Understanding Purity, Marriage, and Family Life in a Catholic Context
iterations.reason_for_cut: This is the entire duration of the provided transcript, covering all discussed topics in a single, continuous flow.

chapters.topic: Defining 'Purity of Heart' and Seeing God in Others
The Process of Sin and Virtue: From Perception to Action
Distinction Between Premarital and Marital Purity
The Importance of Open Communication in Relationships
Challenging Taboos and Open Dialogue in Marriage

The Gift and Discernment of Large Families

Concluding Encouragement for Purity in All Stages
